{{Quote|Notify Fleet Intelligence: looks like Oplovis is coming out to play. ''[…]'' If they are following standard procedures, they'll be moving tomorrow.|General Vernan, to Commander Zgorth'sth|<ref name="TRAS2" />}}
'''Harrod's Planet''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] located in the [[Oplovis sector/Legends|Oplovis sector]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Oplovis Sector Fleet base|base]] of the [[Oplovis Sector Fleet]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] was located on the planet's surface. When the [[Sector fleet/Legends|Sector Fleet]] was [[Battle in the Yuvern system|defeated]] by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] in the [[Yuvern system/Legends|Yuvern system]], it regrouped at Harrod's Planet. The [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Cane Adiss/Legends|Cane Adiss]], whose [[Adiss's ship|starship]] was being [[Inspector/Legends|inspected]] by [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officers]] at the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the attack, was also forced to rendezvous with the [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] there.

Two [[Standard month/Legends|months]] later, the [[Unidentified Imperial admiral (Oplovis Fleet)|admiral]] in [[Commanding officer/Legends|command]] of the Oplovis Sector Fleet was replaced with [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gaen Drommel]]. The fleet spent the following six months stationed near the Harrod's Planet base, and an Alliance [[D-127X|probe droid]] assigned to monitor the Imperial transmissions intercepted and recorded, among other signals, coded bursts from the fleet's [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] to the base on Harrod's Planet.

==Description==
Harrod's Planet was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="TRAS2" /> located in the [[Harrod's Planet system/Legends|Harrod's Planet system]], a part of the [[Oplovis sector/Legends|Oplovis sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It lay on the [[Braxant Run/Legends|Braxant Run]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]], which connected it to the neighboring [[Ketaris system/Legends|Ketaris system]] as well as the [[Lahara sector/Legends|Lahara sector's]] [[Mirgoshir system/Legends|Mirgoshir system]].<ref name="EGTW" /> Harrod's Planet was the single habitable world [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] its [[Star/Legends|star]], [[Harrod]].<ref name="CSWE Harrod" />

==History==
===Base of the Oplovis Sector Fleet===
[[File:CaneAdiss-SWChronicles.png|thumb|right|200px|The smuggler Cane Adiss was forced to transport Imperial officers to Harrod's Planet.]]
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Oplovis Sector Fleet base|base]] of the [[Oplovis Sector Fleet]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] was located on the surface of Harrod's Planet.<ref name="TRAS2" /> At some point, the entire [[Sector fleet/Legends|Sector Fleet]] was stationed in the [[Yuvern system/Legends|Yuvern system]], where it was unexpectedly [[Battle in the Yuvern system|attacked]] by a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Line of battle|battle line]]. Upon being defeated, the Imperial [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] withdrew to Harrod's Planet. The Rebel attack had also interrupted an Imperial inspection of the [[Adiss's ship|starship]] of the [[Yuvernian/Legends|Yuvernian]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Cane Adiss/Legends|Cane Adiss]]. The [[Imperial officer/Legends|officer]] aboard the [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] ordered Adiss to regroup with the Imperial fleet at its base. The Yuvernian returned the [[Inspector/Legends|inspectors]] to Harrod's Planet without further incident. Adiss also agreed to watch out for Rebel activity before leaving the [[Star system/Legends|system]].<ref name="DB">{{DB|character|caneadiss|Adiss, Cane}}</ref>

Two [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the skirmish in the Yuvern system, the Oplovis Sector Fleet was visited by<ref name="TRAS2" /> [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]]<ref name="DB Vader">{{DB|character|darthvader|Vader, Darth}}</ref> [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]],<ref name="TRAS2" /> one of the [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] most loyal servants.<ref name="DB Vader" /> Vader [[Death/Legends|executed]] the [[Unidentified Imperial admiral (Oplovis Fleet)|admiral]] in charge of the fleet and appointed a new [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]],<ref name="TRAS2" /> [[Gaen Drommel]], who [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanded]] from the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] [[Guardian (Executor-class)|''Guardian'']].<ref name="CSWE Harrod" /> For the following six months, the Oplovis fleet remained in covering range of its base on Harrod's Planet and did not perform any major military actions. Rebel [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Zgorth'sth]] later speculated about the fleet's inactivity during that [[Time/Legends|time]]. According to Zgorth'sth, the new admiral spent the first two months processing the [[Paper/Legends|paperwork]] and taking official control of the fleet, which was followed by four months of maneuvers intended to shake down both the personnel of the force and the new command structure.<ref name="TRAS2" />

===Preparing for action===
{{Quote|Tell Fleet I still think they are heading for Atrivis to smear the army on Mantooine.|General Vernan, to Commander Zgorth'sth on the Oplovis Sector Fleet|<ref name="TRAS2" />}}
[[File:Gaen_Drommel.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Harrod's Planet served as the base of the Oplovis Sector Fleet, commanded by Admiral Gaen Drommel.]]
At some point by [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]],<ref name="2 ABY">[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook (Second Edition)|''The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook'', Second Edition]] depicts [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Vernan (general)|Vernan]] as being alive shortly before the [[Battle of the Generis system|battle in the Atrivis system]], which was eventually preceded by the [[Oplovis Sector Fleet]] raising its supply requisitions. ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' further establishes that Vernan had [[Death/Legends|died]] by the time of the sourcebook's setting. Since ''Alliance Intelligence Reports'' represents a collection of [[in-universe]] reports from "one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]"—corresponding to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''—the engagement in the [[Generis system/Legends|Atrivis system]] must have occurred at some point by 2 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]].</ref> the Oplovis Sector Fleet raised its supply requisitions from the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] by 4.1 percent. When Zgorth'sth learned of that fact, he theorized that the Imperial [[Naval Command (Imperial)|Naval Command]] had pressured Admiral Drommel into action, leading the [[Officer/Legends|officer]] to order the extra supplies for an upcoming offensive. In response, Zgorth'st arranged for Alliance assets to monitor the Oplovis fleet.<ref name="TRAS2" />

Eventually, the Alliance [[Probe droid/Legends|probe droid]] [[D-127X]] became stationed on the edges of the Oplovis [[Sector/Legends|sector]], from where he monitored the transmissions of the Sector Fleet. Among the signals recorded by the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] were high-density coded bursts sent from the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of the fleet down to the base on the surface of Harrod's Planet. Four [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] after the start of his mission, D-127X was discovered by an Imperial [[Picket ship/Legends|deep picket vessel]] of the Oplovis Sector Fleet and [[Self-destruct mechanism/Legends|self-destructed]]. When Rebel Alliance [[General/Legends|General]] [[Vernan (general)|Vernan]] was informed of the situation, he speculated that the Oplovis fleet was mobilizing for an attack on the Alliance [[Army/Legends|army]] located on the [[Atrivis sector/Legends|Atrivis sector]] planet [[Mantooine/Legends|Mantooine]]. Vernan predicted that, following standard procedures, the Imperial fleet would leave its station at Harrod's Planet for the Atrivis sector on the following [[Standard day/Legends|day]]. Acting on the general's suggestion, an Alliance battle line led by Admiral [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]] traveled to the [[Generis system/Legends|Atrivis system]], where it then proceeded to [[Battle of the Generis system|attack]] and defeat the Oplovis Sector Fleet as it emerged from [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].<ref name="TRAS2" />

A [[Standard decade/Legends|decade]] later, between [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] and [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]], Harrod's Planet was situated within the borders of the Galactic Empire's successor state, the [[Imperial Remnant]].<ref name="EGTW" />

==Behind the scenes==
"Harrod's planet" was introduced in ''[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook]]'', which was authored by [[Paul Murphy]] and published in [[1990]] for use with [[West End Games]]'s ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="TRAS1">''[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook]]''</ref> In the [[1994]] [[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook (Second Edition)|second edition]] of the book, the planet was referred to as "Harrod's Planet,"<ref name="TRAS2" /> and subsequent sources continued using the capitalized form of the name.<ref name="CSWE Harrod" /><ref name="EGTW" /><ref name="DB" /><ref name="CSWE Oplovis">{{CSWECite|II|417|Oplovis sector}}</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Harrod's Planet system, and therefore Harrod's Planet itself, in grid square M-5.<ref name="TEA" />
